title: Delicate Russian Tofu Pilaf
description: A hearty and flavorful vegan dish featuring tofu, basil, and a blend of herbal spices, perfect for a lazy Sunday afternoon. This pilaf is poached to perfection and offers a delightful chewy texture.
instructions: In a large pot, bring the vegetable broth to a boil over high heat.
Add the brown rice to the pot, stir to combine, then reduce the heat to low and cover.
In a separate pan, sauté the chopped onion and grated carrot in a little water until they are tender.
Add the cubed tofu to the pan and cook until it is lightly browned on all sides.
Stir in the chopped basil leaves, dried thyme, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tofu mixture to the pot with the rice and broth, and stir to combine.
Cover the pot and poach the pilaf over low heat for 20 minutes, or until the liquid has been absorbed and the rice is tender.
Serve the pilaf hot, garnished with additional basil leaves if desired.
